name: Android Release Build
prerequisites: Android SDK installed (via Android Studio or standalone)
Debug keystore generated: keytool -genkey -v -keystore debug.keystore -alias debug -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000
Editor Settings → Export → Android configured with SDK/JDK paths
notes: APK size limit for Google Play: 200 MB (use AAB for larger)
Test on multiple GPU architectures: Adreno, Mali, PowerVR
Enable 'Internet' permission if game uses networking
